name: hashtree-cc
description: hashtree.cc - decentralized file sharing & developer tools

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/core build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/index build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/dexie build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/nostr build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter ndk build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter ndk-cache build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter nostr-social-graph build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/worker build
scripts.test:portable: pnpm run build && node --test tests/portable-build.test.mjs && node ./scripts/portable-smoke.mjs
scripts.publish:portable: pnpm run build && node --test tests/portable-build.test.mjs && node ./scripts/portable-smoke.mjs && node ./scripts/publish-portable.mjs
